title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'deployment_automation' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'deployment_automation' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/deployment_automation/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/deployment_automation/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load deployment_automation's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform deployment_automation's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/deployment_automation/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Harness/spoke/local/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/deployment_automation/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'deployment_automation'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
